summary: Core collaboration-bus scaffolding exists in the metaswarm launcher: ledgers, protocol.json, commander prompt wiring, and env exports are implemented.
The commander agent spec and public docs do not independently document or enforce the collaboration-bus workflow, so behavior currently depends on launcher prompt injection.
Malformed-ledger tolerance is only partially implemented: missing files are safe, but malformed JSONL entries are not parsed/validated by launcher or monitor.
consensus_notes: All five workers agree the launcher implements collaboration-bus scaffolding only for metaswarm runs.
Workers agree documentation/spec coverage lags implementation: README/SKILL mention filesystem IPC, but commander-agent guidance and user-facing adoption flow are incomplete.
No worker found runtime validation for malformed JSONL ledger entries.
blockers: Task-tool responses in this interface did not expose background agent ids; launch_started telemetry used deterministic worker ids as agent_id placeholders.
